title: list
description: The core mod for Farmer's Ranch: Pastoral Serenade modpack
body:
# List Mod Introduction

**List** is the core mod of *Farmer's Ranch: Pastoral Serenade*, designed to provide comprehensive expansions for **Farmer's Delight** and its addons in fisheries, agriculture, and food processing.

## Features

### Relatively Realistic Aquaculture System
Adds eggs and fillets for fish, allowing fish to be bred through eggs, enabling sustainable aquaculture.

### More Fish Species 
More fish from other games (such as LifeAfter and Stardew Valley) as well as from the real world have been added (progress is slow due to lack of art assets).

### Tree Care
Introduces a new planting option for fruit trees: plant them in tree pits. Maintaining the trees yields higher production; neglect may cause them to wither.

### New Crops
A large number of brand-new crops will be introduced, some of which may not be listed in other related mods.
